signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure, the most recent reported, was confirmed via Statistics Korea data and aligns with the Bank of Korea's updated 2026 inflation outlook of 2.2% (raised from 2.1%), amid Middle East-driven energy shocks pushing oil prices higher[1][3]. No
